message:
fix(db): rebuild inbox_stats from ground truth, fix S3-FIFO cache leak, and harden queries

queries.rs: Add rebuild_agent_inbox_stats_in_tx() which does DELETE + INSERT
... SELECT to recompute inbox_stats counters from message_recipients joined
with messages. This is the canonical consistency fix — it is always correct
regardless of whether SQLite triggers fire or are absent. Called after
mark_message_read, mark_all_messages_read_in_project, acknowledge_message,
and create_message_with_recipients_tx. Also adds rebuild_all_inbox_stats()
for startup reconciliation.

mark_message_read and mark_all_messages_read_in_project now auto-acknowledge
messages with ack_required=1 when marking them as read. Agents consistently
fail to call acknowledge_message explicitly, so reading IS acknowledgment.

create_message_with_recipients_tx: Fix SQL injection vulnerability in agent
name lookup — previously interpolated agent IDs directly into the query
string. Now uses parameterized placeholders.

cache.rs: Add invalidate_all_inbox_stats_scoped() to bulk-invalidate all
cached inbox stats for a given DB scope, used by rebuild_all_inbox_stats.

s3fifo.rs: Fix a cache entry leak caused by updating the seq number on cache
hits. S3-FIFO hits should NOT move items to the back of the queue; updating
seq without pushing to the queue orphans the entry. Also fix keys() iterator
to use the index HashMap instead of the queue VecDeques, which could miss
entries or include stale tombstones. Add regression test.

schema.rs: Change FTS backfill migrations from INSERT OR REPLACE to plain
INSERT, and fix indentation of the v7_backfill_fts_agents migration.

stress.rs: Update test assertions to match the new auto-ack-on-read
behavior — mark_message_read now sets ack_pending_count to 0 for
ack_required messages, and acknowledge_message is idempotent thereafter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
